description: lookup_user_by_email uses a prepared statement with parameter binding; lookup_session_by_uuid and lookup_tenant_by_slug build the SQL via string concatenation.

findings.rationale: lookup_user_by_email uses prepare()+execute() with bound parameters while the other two lookups string-concatenate input into the SQL query. Unifying onto a single concatenated helper re-introduces a SQL-injection vector on the login flow.
